title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 02 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 02 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 02 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/04/2025
Today, the DCE continued to fluctuate upward. The most-traded contract I2505 closed at 791.5,with a daily increase of 1.09%. Traders sold goods according to market conditions, while steel mills restocked as needed, with moderate purchase willingness.
